class.name: VHSShader
class.brief_description: Post-process effect class that implements a VHS-tape-like effect.
class.description: Post-process effect class that implements a VHS-tape-like effect. This effect has multiple parameters that one could play with and is one of the most customizable ones from [b]GodotStylizedShadersPlugin[/b].
class.members: <member name="m_scanline_blend_factor" type="EncapsuledData" setter="set" getter="get" default="0.01"> <member name="m_scanline_height" type="EncapsuledData" setter="set" getter="get" default="4.0"> <member name="m_scanline_intensity" type="EncapsuledData" setter="set" getter="get" default="0.25"> <member name="m_scanline_scroll_speed" type="EncapsuledData" setter="set" getter="get" default="16.0"> <member name="m_scanline_enabled" type="EncapsuledData" setter="set" getter="get" default="true"> <member name="m_grain_intensity" type="EncapsuledData" setter="set" getter="get" default="2.0"> <member name="m_grain_enabled" type="EncapsuledData" setter="set" getter="get" default="true"> <member name="m_vertical_band_speed" type="EncapsuledData" setter="set" getter="get" default="0.2"> <member name="m_vertical_band_height" type="EncapsuledData" setter="set" getter="get" default="0.01"> <member name="m_vertical_band_intensity" type="EncapsuledData" setter="set" getter="get" default="0.2"> <member name="m_vertical_band_choppiness" type="EncapsuledData" setter="set" getter="get" default="0.2"> <member name="m_vertical_band_static_amount" type="EncapsuledData" setter="set" getter="get" default="0.02"> <member name="m_vertical_band_warp_factor" type="EncapsuledData" setter="set" getter="get" default="0.005"> <member name="m_vertical_band_enabled" type="EncapsuledData" setter="set" getter="get" default="true"> <member name="m_dt" type="EncapsuledData" setter="set" getter="get" default="0.0">
